//: Coverage scope = the NODE-executed surface. The browser bundle (gui/public/arena/*.js) runs in the browser and is covered by the Playwright E2E suite, not by node unit/integration tests — including it here would report a false 0%. Thresholds are set just below the measured baseline (lines 76.6 / branches 67.7 / functions 86.5) so coverage can't silently regress.
